title: The Ugly Duckling

segments.text: Once a baby bird was born in a duck family.
He looked different from his brothers and sisters.
They laughed at him and called him ugly.
He felt sad and ran away.
He spent the long winter alone.
When spring came, he saw beautiful white birds on the lake.
To his surprise, his reflection in the water was also a beautiful white swan.
He had grown into the most beautiful bird of all.

transcript: Once a baby bird was born in a duck family. He looked different from his brothers and sisters. They laughed at him and called him ugly. He felt sad and ran away. He spent the long winter alone. When spring came, he saw beautiful white birds on the lake. To his surprise, his reflection in the water was also a beautiful white swan. He had grown into the most beautiful bird of all.
